title: instance.network Facet
description: Demanded by the awsec2 Syncer Contract (charter §1.1; ADR-0095). The network placement of a cloud instance Entity — emitted by normalizeInstance, validated at the Projector write path.

vpcId.description: the VPC the instance is placed in

subnetId.description: the subnet the instance is placed in

availabilityZone.description: the AZ the instance runs in
